nasb.text: and see among the captives a beautiful woman, and have a desire for her and would take her as a wife for yourself,

esv.text: and you see among the captives a beautiful woman, and you desire to take her to be your wife,

cnv.text: 如果你在被擄的人中看見了容貌美好的女子，就戀慕她，要娶她作妻子，

ccb.text: 如果你们有人在俘虏中看见美丽的女子，被她吸引，想娶她为妻，
